The following themes were identified as particularly relevant for SGH staff development in 2025:1. Shift Toward Patient -Centered and Value -Based Care The transition from volume - to value -based healthcare under Vision 2030 emphasizes outcome -driven service delivery.

m volume - to value -based healthcare under Vision 2030 emphasizes outcome -driven service delivery. Market Competition and Privatization Pressure The growth of private hospitals and mega healthcare projects has intensified competition. SGH staff are expected to demonstrate consistent professionalism, accountability , and superior service delivery to retain patient trust . 4.

Accreditation and Regulatory Readiness With CBAHI, JCI, and MoL compliance becoming more central to healthcare operations, all staff must maintain high standards in documentation , infection control, safety, and policy adherence. 6. Workforce Nationalization (Saudization) As more Saudi nationals join healthcare roles, focus on developing key skills such as cultural competency, effective communication, patient -centered care, and time management.
